19383.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
19383.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

19384.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
19384.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

19385.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
19385.description: We've gone back to the 80s here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

19386.title: Forever 80s
19386.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

19387.title: Who's That 80s Girl?
19387.description: Check out all of the greatest hits from our favourite girls of the 80s!

19388.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
19388.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

25981.title: ... So 80s!
25981.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
